summary: Comprehensive testing of GPI Document Hub - Sales Order Preflight Review Panel. All 11 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified working via Playwright testing.
passed_tests: POST /api/gpi-integration/sales-orders/preflight/{doc_id} - returns document_summary with doc_id, source, type, customer, PO, date, amount, extraction completeness
POST /api/gpi-integration/sales-orders/preflight/{doc_id} - returns validation_checklist with pass/fail/warn items (customer, required fields, duplicate, lines, extraction, credentials)
POST /api/gpi-integration/sales-orders/preflight/{doc_id} - returns resolved_lines with mapping metadata (lineType, description, qty, unitPrice, mapping object)
POST /api/gpi-integration/sales-orders/preflight/{doc_id} - returns mapped_values with bc_read_environment='Production' and bc_write_environment='Sandbox_11_3_2025'
POST /api/gpi-integration/sales-orders/from-document/{doc_id} - accepts JSON body with edited_lines and customer_no_override
POST /api/gpi-integration/sales-orders/from-document/{doc_id} - validates edited lines against catalog, rejects invalid Item targets with 422 catalog_validation_failed
POST /api/gpi-integration/sales-orders/from-document/{doc_id} - validates edited lines against catalog, rejects invalid G/L Account targets with 422
POST /api/gpi-integration/sales-orders/from-document/{doc_id} - accepts Comment lines without target validation
POST /api/gpi-integration/sales-orders/from-document/{doc_id} - returns 422 missing_customer when customer not resolved and no override provided
Frontend: Environment Banner shows 'Read: Production' and 'Write: Sandbox_11_3_2025'
Frontend: Document Summary shows doc ID, source, type, customer, PO, date, amount, extraction completeness
Frontend: Validation Checklist shows pass/fail/warn icons for customer, required fields, duplicate check, lines, extraction, credentials
Frontend: BC Customer Number (required) input appears when customer not resolved
Frontend: Order Total displays correctly ($2,250.00 for test document)
Frontend: Line table shows Widget A and Widget B lines as Comment type
seed_data_creation: Used existing test document 44b2e236-c1ab-4e0e-9c23-23f542d68a71 with Widget A/Widget B lines
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sales Order Preflight Review Panel testing complete. Key endpoints: POST /api/gpi-integration/sales-orders/preflight/{doc_id} returns structured preflight data, POST /api/gpi-integration/sales-orders/from-document/{doc_id} creates SO with catalog validation. Test document 44b2e236-c1ab-4e0e-9c23-23f542d68a71 has no resolved customer (must use customer_no_override). Catalog validation correctly rejects FAKE_ITEM_999 and invalid GL accounts. Email service is MOCKED.

preflight_endpoint.document_summary: Returns doc_id, source, document_type, customer_no, customer_name, external_doc_no, order_date, total_amount, extraction_completeness
preflight_endpoint.validation_checklist: 6 items: customer resolved, required fields, duplicate check, lines resolved, extraction completeness, BC credentials
preflight_endpoint.resolved_lines: Returns lines with lineType, description, quantity, unitPrice, mapping metadata

create_endpoint.edited_lines: Accepts JSON body with edited_lines array
create_endpoint.catalog_validation: Validates Item and Account targets against synced catalog
create_endpoint.error_response: Returns 422 with catalog_validation_failed error for invalid targets
create_endpoint.customer_validation: Returns 422 missing_customer when no customer resolved

frontend.document_summary: Displays all required fields with appropriate icons
frontend.validation_checklist: Shows pass/fail/warn icons for each validation item
frontend.line_table: Editable table with type dropdown, description, qty, price, target fields
frontend.order_total: Displays computed total from line items
frontend.customer_override: Input field appears when customer not resolved
frontend.confirmation_bar: Shows line count, customer, environment, and total
